_meta.note: 3-8 English Wikipedia article titles per channel, four-category logic (geography, institutions, doctrine, chokepoints): articles a reader would actually visit during a crisis. Structural pages only -- places and institutions, never event pages (same ex-ante spirit as the dictionaries). Every title verified against the pageviews API on the filled_on date; canonical titles matter (data lives under 'CAATSA' and 'Houthi movement', not their redirects).

us_trade: Trade policy of the United States
shipping: Piracy off the coast of Somalia
